system.majorEffect: Instant death — heart and lung paralysis.
system.minorEffect: Violent limb tremors. No actions can be taken for 5–6 minutes.
system.notes: Cobra/viper venom. Fangs must maintain bite to deliver full potency. Pulling snake off early may reduce Potency by 1–2. Any armour rating on the bitten limb blocks completely. Potency range: 4–9 depending on snake age and bite duration.

system.majorEffect: –1 Body per hour until successfully treated. Fatal if Body reaches 0.
system.minorEffect: Dizzy, nauseous, stomach cramps. All actions at –2d penalty for a full day.
system.notes: Syringe-like fangs inject a full dose on every bite. Any form of armour (even AR 1) blocks the bite entirely. Potency range: 6–8.

system.minorEffect: Automatically fails all Body+Vigor rolls for 7 days (does not apply to Vigor rolls resisting this poison).
system.notes: Ingested poison. Muddy red paste, nearly undetectable in food (Difficulty 9 to taste/smell). Takes effect 14–24 hours after ingestion. Requires Herbalism or Expert: Poisoner (Difficulty 5) to produce. Capital offence to possess in Uldholm and Dindavara. Cost 7–8.

system.majorEffect: As per cult description (GM discretion based on dosage).
system.minorEffect: Localised numbness and tissue damage at wound site.
system.notes: Applied to arrowheads. Slow to absorb — weapon must remain in flesh for 1 full round before Potency is rolled. If removed early, a successful Potency roll only produces Minor effect; failure produces no effect. Cultists use hooked arrows with breakaway shafts to prevent easy removal.
